meaning: n.震动,刺耳声,震惊,争吵,罐,广口瓶vi.震惊,冲突,发刺耳声,不一致vt.震动,刺激
examples: She opened up a jar of plums.
I can't get the lid off this jar.
This jar will hold a kilo.
Mondoux gave Schreiner a jar of chafing cream for his journey, told him he'd need it.
Cereza recently yanked some old lottery tickets out of a cookie jar at his house.
